Remuneration Incentive Programs Corporate Governance Reports English Swe (Investor) Contact Us Press Releases Home / News / Press Releases / Enea acquires Openwave Mobility for USD 90 million Regulatory Information | February 27, 2018 | 8:00 am CET Enea acquires Openwave Mobility for USD 90 million Enea AB (publ) (“Enea”) has signed an agreement to acquire Openwave Mobility, a company offering the industry’s most scalable NFV platform with solutions to mobile operators.
Openwave Mobility has a leading position in traffic management for the fast growing area of mobile video traffic.
The total consideration amounts to USD 90M and will be financed through cash at hand and the previously issued and announced bond loan of SEK 500M.
